zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochow於1370年1月13日出生在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特時，他的父親Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe26歲，母親Mariota Margaret Campbell25歲。他於大約1400年與Marjorie Marceline Stewart在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1453年2月在蘇格蘭阿吉爾吉爾蒙享年83歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾蒙吉爾蒙 帕里什 邱奇 安德 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochow于1370年1月13日出生在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特时，他的父亲Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe26岁，母亲Mariota Margaret Campbell25岁。他于大约1400年与Marjorie Marceline Stewart在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1453年2月在苏格兰阿吉爾吉爾蒙享年83岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾蒙吉爾蒙 帕里什 邱奇 安德 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Campbell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Campell
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Campbell   (see also   Camel  ).

variants.name: Beauchamp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Camel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Napoleon, Patrice.

English (of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (from Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos), possibly denoting a clumsy person or someone with long legs. It may also be a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with a sign depicting a camel (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English); compare 5 below.
English: possibly a habitational name from Queen Camel and West Camel in Somerset, early recorded as Camel(le), possibly a Celtic name from canto- ‘border, district’ and mēl ‘bare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Duncan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Donnchadh , also used among people without Scottish connections. This was the name of a 7th-century Scottish saint (abbot of Iona) and two medieval kings of Scotland. The final ‐n in the Anglicized form seems to be the result of confusion with the Gaelic word ceann ‘head’ in the Latinized form Duncanus. Compare Irish Donagh .

variants.name: Donnchadh
meanings: Gaelic: compound of Old Celtic donn ‘brown’ + chadh ‘chief’ or ‘noble’.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochow was born on 13 January 1370, in Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe, was 26 and his mother, Mariota Margaret Campbell, was 25. He married Marjorie Marceline Stewart about 1400, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in February 1453, in Kilmun, Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 83, and was buried in Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochow est né le 13 janvier 1370, à Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mariota Margaret Campbell, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Marjorie Marceline Stewart environ 1400, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en février 1453, à Kilmun, Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterré à Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochow am 13. Januar 1370 in Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe 26 und seine Mutter Mariota Margaret Campbell 25. Er hat um 1400 in Scotland Marjorie Marceline Stewart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb im Februar 1453 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Kilmun, Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochow è nato il il 13 gennaio 1370 nel Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Mariota Margaret Campbell, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Marjorie Marceline Stewart circa 1400, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel febbraio 1453, nel Kilmun, Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochowが1370年1月13日にイギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトで生まれた時，父Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochaweは26歳，母Mariota Margaret Campbellは25歳であった。約1400年にスコットランドでMarjorie Marceline Stewartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1453年2月にスコットランドアルグイルキルムンで83歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトキルムンキルムン パーイッシュ チャーチ アンド セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochow(이)가 1370년 1월 13일 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mariota Margaret Campbell(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1400년 스컷랜드에서 Marjorie Marceline Stewart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1453년 2월 스컷랜드 아그이 킬먼에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킬먼 킬먼 파리시 처르치 앤드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochow nasceu em 13 de janeiro de 1370, em Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mariota Margaret Campbell, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Marjorie Marceline Stewart aproximadamente 1400, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em fevereiro de 1453, em Kilmun, Argyll, Scotland, com 83 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Taynuilt, Argyll and Bute, Scotland: теинуилт, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmu: килмун пэриш чурч анд кеметири, килмун, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochow родился 13 января 1370 г. в местности аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mariota Margaret Campbell, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Marjorie Marceline Stewart около 1400 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер февраль 1453 г. в местности килмун, аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 83 лет и был похоронен в местности килмун пэриш чурч анд кеметири, килмун, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Duncan Campbell 1st Lord of Lochow nació el 13 de enero de 1370, en Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Colin Campbell 13th. Knight of Lochawe, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mariota Margaret Campbell, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Marjorie Marceline Stewart aproximadamente 1400, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en febrero de 1453, en Kilmun, Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultado en Kilmun Parish Church And Cemetery, Kilmun, Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido.
